author: y4rr
content: Pass 5.A.1 (#1099) closed APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS. Behavioral fix mirrors FasterRcnn/MaskRcnn convention; vision + hub registries now have ssd300_vgg16 entries; discriminating test ssd300_module_forward_matches_inherent_scores added to ssd.rs::tests; sabotage probe confirmed regression-trap. Follow-up #1130 filed for SSD300 weight pin (parallel to #456-weights / #964-weights / #457-weights).
